_meta.description: Enrichment metadata for RedClaw pipeline assets. Keyed by lowercase canonical drug name or RO/GDC number. Used by rank_portfolio() to merge phase, TA, and indication context.

fields.primary_indication: Lead indication in most advanced trial
fields.modality: mAb | bispecific | ADC | small_molecule | ASO | siRNA | mRNA | cell_therapy | gene_therapy | protein | other
fields.safety_signals: Known or clinically significant AEs to flag

atezolizumab.primary_indication: NSCLC, TNBC, hepatocellular carcinoma, urothelial carcinoma

phesgo.primary_indication: HER2-positive breast cancer (subcutaneous pertuzumab + trastuzumab FDC)
phesgo.mechanism: HER2 dimerization inhibitor (pertuzumab) + anti-HER2 (trastuzumab), SC fixed-dose combination

ocrelizumab.primary_indication: Relapsing-remitting MS (RRMS) and primary progressive MS (PPMS)
ocrelizumab.safety_signals: Infusion reactions, increased infection risk (PML rare), neoplasms

emicizumab.mechanism: Bispecific anti-FIXa/FX antibody mimicking FVIII cofactor function
emicizumab.safety_signals: Thrombotic microangiopathy (with aPCC), injection site reactions

risdiplam.mechanism: SMN2 pre-mRNA splicing modifier — increases full-length SMN protein
risdiplam.safety_signals: Photosensitivity, reproductive toxicity; generally well tolerated

faricimab.primary_indication: Neovascular (wet) AMD and diabetic macular edema (DME)
faricimab.mechanism: Bispecific anti-VEGF-A/Ang-2 antibody — dual pathway anti-angiogenic
faricimab.safety_signals: Endophthalmitis, retinal detachment (intravitreal injection class effect)

crovalimab.mechanism: Anti-C5 complement inhibitor with subcutaneous recycling antibody technology

glofitamab.safety_signals: CRS (cytokine release syndrome), neurotoxicity (ICANS), obinutuzumab pretreatment required

obinutuzumab.safety_signals: Infusion reactions, neutropenia, tumor flare reaction

satralizumab.primary_indication: Neuromyelitis optica spectrum disorder (NMOSD) — AQP4-IgG seropositive
satralizumab.mechanism: Anti-IL-6 receptor (recycling antibody technology for extended half-life)
satralizumab.safety_signals: Infection risk, lipid changes, injection site reactions

entrectinib.primary_indication: NTRK fusion-positive solid tumors, ROS1+ NSCLC
entrectinib.mechanism: Pan-TRK/ROS1/ALK kinase inhibitor with CNS penetration
entrectinib.safety_signals: Weight gain, fatigue, dizziness, cardiac failure (QTc)

pralsetinib.primary_indication: RET fusion-positive NSCLC, RET-mutant medullary thyroid cancer

alectinib.mechanism: Second-generation ALK/RET kinase inhibitor with CNS penetration

vemurafenib.safety_signals: Photosensitivity, squamous cell carcinoma, QTc prolongation, MAPK paradoxical activation

cobimetinib.primary_indication: BRAF V600E/K-mutant melanoma (in combination with vemurafenib)
cobimetinib.safety_signals: Rash, diarrhea, CPK elevation, hemorrhage, retinopathy

vismodegib.primary_indication: Advanced basal cell carcinoma (locally advanced or metastatic BCC)
vismodegib.safety_signals: Muscle spasms, alopecia, dysgeusia, embryo-fetal toxicity

inavolisib.primary_indication: PIK3CA-mutated HR+/HER2- locally advanced/metastatic breast cancer (with palbociclib + fulvestrant)
inavolisib.mechanism: Selective PI3Kα (PIK3CA) inhibitor with mutant-selective mechanism (degrades mutant p110α)

giredestrant.primary_indication: HR+/HER2- breast cancer (ESR1 wild-type and mutant)
giredestrant.mechanism: Selective estrogen receptor degrader (SERD) — oral, pan-mutant active

tiragolumab.primary_indication: NSCLC with high PD-L1 expression (in combination with atezolizumab)
tiragolumab.safety_signals: Immune-related AEs, rash; SKYSCRAPER-01 missed OS endpoint — ongoing trials

fenebrutinib.primary_indication: Multiple sclerosis (RRMS and PPMS) — primary neuroinflammation target
fenebrutinib.mechanism: Non-covalent BTK inhibitor (CNS-penetrant) — depletes B cells and microglia signaling
fenebrutinib.safety_signals: Liver enzyme elevation, infections; monitoring required

idasanutlin.mechanism: MDM2 antagonist — reactivates p53 tumor suppressor

etrolizumab.primary_indication: Ulcerative colitis and Crohn's disease — Phase III failed (2021-2022)
etrolizumab.mechanism: Anti-β7 integrin (dual α4β7 and αEβ7) — blocks gut lymphocyte homing
etrolizumab.safety_signals: Infection risk, nasopharyngitis; failed primary endpoints vs. placebo

tominersen.mechanism: Antisense oligonucleotide targeting huntingtin (HTT) mRNA — reduces mHTT protein
tominersen.safety_signals: Neurotoxicity at higher doses (Phase III paused 2021, restarted in lower-dose cohort); CSF infusion required

semorinemab.primary_indication: Alzheimer's disease (moderate AD) — failed Phase II (2022)
semorinemab.mechanism: Anti-tau N-terminal antibody — targets extracellular tau aggregates
semorinemab.safety_signals: ARIA (amyloid-related imaging abnormalities), infusion reactions; failed vs. placebo

gantenerumab.primary_indication: Early Alzheimer's disease — Phase III failed (2022, GRADUATE I/II)
gantenerumab.mechanism: Anti-amyloid-β antibody targeting fibrillar Aβ plaques
gantenerumab.safety_signals: ARIA-E (edema) and ARIA-H (microhemorrhage); failed primary CDR-SB endpoint

crenezumab.primary_indication: Familial Alzheimer's disease (PSEN1 E280A) + sporadic AD — failed Phase III
crenezumab.mechanism: Anti-amyloid-β IgG4 antibody — low ARIA risk due to IgG4 backbone
crenezumab.safety_signals: Low ARIA rate; failed Phase III (2019); APECS prevention trial completed without disease modification signal

trontinemab.mechanism: Anti-TfR1 × anti-Aβ bispecific — brain shuttle technology for enhanced CNS delivery of amyloid antibody
trontinemab.safety_signals: ARIA expected (monitoring required); novel TfR1-mediated delivery

divarasib.safety_signals: GI toxicity, hepatotoxicity; combination with cetuximab explored for CRC

lomvastomig.mechanism: PD-1 × TIGIT bispecific antibody (co-blockade of two checkpoint axes)

tobemstomig.primary_indication: Various solid tumors and hematologic malignancies

selnoflast.safety_signals: Generally well tolerated; class-specific infection risk

vixarelimab.primary_indication: Atopic dermatitis, prurigo nodularis, eosinophilic esophagitis
vixarelimab.mechanism: Anti-OSMR (oncostatin M receptor) — blocks OSM and IL-31 signaling (pruritogenic/type-2 inflammatory)

selicrelumab.primary_indication: Advanced solid tumors (pancreatic cancer, CRC, others)
selicrelumab.mechanism: CD40 agonist antibody — activates antigen-presenting cells for anti-tumor immunity
selicrelumab.safety_signals: Cytokine release, transaminase elevation, thromboembolic events

autogene_cevumeran.primary_indication: NSCLC, pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC), TNBC — personalized neoantigen mRNA vaccine
autogene_cevumeran.mechanism: Individualized neoantigen mRNA cancer vaccine (BNT111-class, combined with atezolizumab or other IOs)
autogene_cevumeran.safety_signals: Injection site reactions, flu-like symptoms; manufacturing scale challenges

sacituzumab_govitecan.primary_indication: TROP2-expressing solid tumors: TNBC, urothelial carcinoma, NSCLC, HR+ BC
sacituzumab_govitecan.mechanism: TROP2-directed ADC with SN-38 payload (topoisomerase I inhibitor) — high drug-antibody ratio
sacituzumab_govitecan.safety_signals: Neutropenia, diarrhea, alopecia, nausea; UGT1A1 genotype increases SN-38 exposure

runimotamab.primary_indication: HER2-expressing solid tumors (NSCLC, GI, breast cancer)

afimkibart.mechanism: Anti-TL1A antibody — blocks TNF-like cytokine 1A (TNFSF15) which drives intestinal inflammation
afimkibart.safety_signals: URTI, injection site reactions; emerging target with Roivant partnership (RVT-3101)

bitopertin.mechanism: GlyT1 (glycine transporter 1) inhibitor — enhances NMDA receptor function
bitopertin.safety_signals: Anemia (dose-limiting), well tolerated otherwise; failed primary endpoint

lebrikizumab.mechanism: Anti-IL-13 monoclonal antibody — blocks type-2 inflammation pathway
lebrikizumab.safety_signals: Conjunctivitis, injection site reactions; similar class AE profile to dupilumab

mircera.mechanism: Methoxy PEG-epoetin beta — continuous erythropoietin receptor activator (CERA) with extended half-life
mircera.safety_signals: Hypertension, thromboembolic events, pure red cell aplasia (rare), cardiovascular risk at high Hb targets

taselisib.primary_indication: HR+/HER2- breast cancer (PIK3CA-mutant) — SANDPIPER Phase III failed (2018)
taselisib.safety_signals: GI toxicity, hyperglycemia, rash, pneumonitis; unfavorable risk/benefit

lampalizumab.primary_indication: Geographic atrophy (GA) secondary to AMD — Phase III failed (2018)
lampalizumab.mechanism: Anti-complement factor D (CFD) antibody — blocks alternative complement pathway
lampalizumab.safety_signals: Endophthalmitis (intravitreal); failed to show GA lesion slowing

vanucizumab.mechanism: VEGF-A × Ang-2 bispecific antibody — dual anti-angiogenic

emactuzumab.safety_signals: Edema, periorbital edema, fatigue, elevated liver enzymes

gdc1971.primary_indication: Advanced solid tumors (NSCLC, HER2+ cancers, KRAS-mutant tumors)
gdc1971.mechanism: SHP2 (PTPN11) allosteric inhibitor — blocks RAS/MAPK pathway signaling
gdc1971.safety_signals: Rash, GI effects; combination therapy development

ro7314.mechanism: AVPR1A (vasopressin 1a receptor) antagonist — modulates social behavior circuits

ro4917523.primary_indication: Fragile X syndrome, MDD — GRM5 mGluR5 NAM
ro4917523.safety_signals: CNS effects; limited efficacy in FXS

simlukafusp_alfa.primary_indication: Advanced solid tumors — FAP-expressing tumors (pancreatic, CRC, NSCLC stroma)
simlukafusp_alfa.mechanism: FAP-targeted IL-2 variant (FAP-IL2v) — localizes IL-2 activity to tumor stroma
simlukafusp_alfa.safety_signals: Flu-like syndrome, weight loss, cardiovascular effects of IL-2 class

nacubactam.safety_signals: Renal effects (class effect); generally well tolerated
